description: Product description Get ready for endless fun with these Neon Flashing Spiky Balls (6.5cm) in a Pack of 18 Assorted Colours! These LED light-up spiky balls are perfect for kids' parties, stress relief, and sensory play. With their vibrant ashing colours, each ball creates a fun light show when squeezed or bounced. Ideal for party favors, goodie bag llers, and event giveaways, these spiky balls are not only fun to play with but also perfect for relieving stress and anxiety. Get this pack of 18 for maximum fun! Safety Warning KEEP AWAY FROM FIRE
